zopublic_exponent must be either 3 (for legacy compatibility) or 65537. Almost everyone should choose 65537 here!i
z#key_size must be at least 512-bits.

modulusr
modulus must be >= 3.z
p must be < modulus.z
q must be < modulus.z
dmp1 must be < modulus.z
dmq1 must be < modulus.z
iqmp must be < modulus.z#private_exponent must be < modulus.z+public_exponent must be >= 3 and < modulus.
public_exponent must be odd.z
dmp1 must be odd.z
dmq1 must be odd.z
p*q must equal modulus.rD
_check_private_key_components
n must be >= 3.z
e must be >= 3 and < n.rM
e must be odd.rD

    Modular Multiplicative Inverse. Returns x such that: (x*e) mod m == 1
    )
divmod)	rO
_modinv
    Compute the CRT (q ** -1) % p value from RSA primes p and q.
    )
rsa_crt_iqmp
    Compute the CRT private_exponent % (p - 1) value from the RSA
    private_exponent (d) and p.
    rM
rsa_crt_dmp1
    Compute the CRT private_exponent % (q - 1) value from the RSA
    private_exponent (d) and q.
    rM
rsa_crt_dmq1
    Compute factors p and q from the private exponent d. We assume that n has
    no more than two factors. This function is adapted from code in PyCrypto.
    rM
FTz2Unable to compute factors p and q from exponent d.)
